pathAssistantSteps.info:
• Preforming credit checks on the Dealer
  • If indirect (Dealers involved) opportunities of $1M or greater go through Finance for approval
  • If direct (no Dealer involved) opportunities of $500K or greater go through Finance for approval

• Purchase Order Received from Dealer
  • Adjusting the contractual terms, delivery terms and dates as necessary
  • Obtaining the P.O. from the dealer. The Dealer gets the PO from the Customer

• Technical Application Fit Confirmed
  • Purchasing Ability Budget Confirmed
  • Identify additional decision markers
  • Determining if purchase is a group is an individual decision
  • Strategizing with the dealer on approach
  • Confirming the technical fit
  • Demo-ing the product
  • Confirm funding is available for the purchase
  • (for direct customer) Gathering data on the required specifications

• ID Purchasing, Owner or Decision Maker
  • Financial Ability Checked
  • Ongoing Communication with the Dealer
  • Gathering Customer information (technical and financial)

• Customer Needs Confirmed
  • Proposal Completed
  • Customer contractual terms with the dealer. Adjusting necessary
  • Confirming delivery terms and date. Adjusting as necessary
  • Finalizing the proposal
  • The Dealer checks the Customer´s credit
